name: Chocolate Chip-Toffee Scones - Fresh Cream Cafe
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Lightly butter two heavy large baking sheets.
3. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt. Stir in chocolate chips, walnuts, and toffee bits.
4. Beat whipping cream until stiff peaks form in another large bowl. Fold whipped cream into the dry ingredients. Mix until just combined.
5. Turn dough out onto lightly floured surface. Knead gently until a soft dough forms (about 2 minutes).
6. Form dough into a ball and pat to form an 1-1/4 inch thick round. Cut into 12 wedges.
7. Transfer wedges to prepared baking sheets, spacing apart. Brush with melted butter. Sprinkle with additional sugar.
8. Bake until golden brown, about 20 minutes. Serve warm.
